commands.editOrConvertToFileTask: Edit or convert to file task
commands.convertFileTaskToInlineTask: Convert file task to inline task

modals.reallocateEstimateMessage: "{{child}}" increased by {{delta}}. Reduce "{{parent}}"'s estimate by {{delta}} to keep the same total?
modals.taskCreatorDiscardMessage: Your unsaved changes will be discarded.
modals.convertCurrentNoteMessage: Convert the current markdown note into an Operon file task?
modals.convertFileTaskToInlineTitle: Convert File Task to Inline Task
modals.convertFileTaskToInlineMessage: This will convert the selected file task into a single inline task. Only canonical Operon data is preserved: description, checkbox state, tags, and canonical fields. File body content, comments, custom or non-canonical frontmatter, and other markdown content are not moved into the inline task. After the inline task is created, the source file is moved to Obsidian trash.
modals.taskFinderProjectTasksTooltip: Choose a parent task, then search that parent and its direct children.
modals.taskFinderProjectTreeTooltip: Choose a parent task, then search that parent and all descendants.
modals.taskFinderOverdueTooltip: Show tasks whose scheduled date or due date is in the past.
modals.taskFinderHappensTodayTooltip: Show open tasks whose due, scheduled, or started date is today.
modals.taskFinderRecentModifiedTooltip: Show tasks modified in the {{period}}, newest first.
modals.taskFinderIncludeInlineTooltipActive: Inline tasks are included in the current Task Finder scope.
modals.taskFinderIncludeInlineTooltipInactive: Add inline tasks to the Task Finder scope.
modals.taskFinderIncludeFileTooltipActive: File tasks are included in the current Task Finder scope.
modals.taskFinderIncludeFileTooltipInactive: Add file tasks to the Task Finder scope.
modals.taskFinderIncludeCancelledTooltip: Add cancelled tasks to the search scope.
modals.taskFinderIncludeFinishedTooltip: Add finished tasks to the search scope.

notifications.noTaskFound: No task line found at cursor
notifications.noTaskWithId: No task with operonId found at cursor
notifications.taskStatsBackfillComplete: Task stats backfilled — {{parents}} parent tasks, {{writes}} writes
notifications.taskStatsBackfillFailed: Task stats backfill failed — {{failed}} parent writes failed
notifications.multipleActiveTrackersResolved: Operon: Found {{count}} active trackers. Keeping the newest one.
notifications.inlineCopied: Inline task line copied to clipboard
notifications.noTaskInFile: No Operon task found in this file
notifications.clipboardReadFailed: Clipboard read failed. Copy an operonId and try again.
notifications.singleLineFileTaskSelectionRequired: Select a single line fragment to create a file task
notifications.fileTaskSeedRequiresNonTaskLine: You can only seed a file task source from a non-task line.
notifications.moveInlineTaskTargetRequiresBlankLine: Place the cursor on an empty line before moving an inline task.
notifications.moveInlineTaskRequiresInlineSource: Choose an inline task to move.
notifications.projectedRecurringShiftLimit: Projected recurring task dates can only move inside the open window between neighboring recurrence slots.
notifications.followingRecurringShiftLimit: This and following tasks can only move inside the open window between neighboring recurrence slots.
notifications.recurringDateMoveWindowLimit: Recurring task dates can only move inside the open window between the previous and next recurrence slots.
notifications.dailyRecurringDateMoveLimit: Daily recurring tasks cannot move to another date. Change only the time or skip this occurrence.
notifications.calendarTrackedSessionInvalidRange: Select a valid time range before creating a tracked session.
notifications.calendarTrackedSessionSaveFailed: Could not store tracked time for this block.
notifications.openingLatestRecurringRealTask: Opening the most recently created task in this recurring series.
notifications.externalCalendarSyncSkipped: External calendar sync needs a valid URL.
notifications.externalCalendarsSyncComplete: External calendars updated. Synced: {{synced}}, failed: {{failed}}, skipped: {{skipped}}.
notifications.calendarFilterMismatch: This task does not match the current calendar filter. Opening the task editor.
notifications.kanbanFilterMismatch: This task does not match the current kanban filter. Opening the task editor.
notifications.calendarCreatedTaskFilterMismatch: Created task does not match the current calendar filter.
notifications.kanbanCreatedTaskFilterMismatch: Created task does not match the current kanban filter.
notifications.creatorPostCreateFinalizeFailed: Task was created, but follow-up setup failed.
notifications.kanbanChoosePipeline: Choose a pipeline for this kanban preset in settings.
notifications.kanbanNoColumns: No kanban columns are available for this preset yet.
notifications.kanbanNoTasks: No tasks match the current kanban preset.
notifications.kanbanParentSearchNoParents: No parent tasks found in the current scope.

notifications.dailyNoteResolveFailed: Could not resolve the target daily note.
notifications.dailyNoteInlineCreateFailed: Failed to create the inline task in the daily note.
notifications.dailyNoteInlineOpenFailed: Created the inline task, but Operon could not open the editor.
notifications.dailyNoteInlineParseFailed: Created the inline task, but Operon could not parse it for editing.
notifications.duplicateOperonIdBlocked: Resolve duplicate operonId copies before editing this task.
notifications.inlineTaskTargetMissing: Choose a default inline task file in settings or enable daily note saving.
notifications.inlineTaskTargetInvalid: The configured inline task file could not be found.
notifications.inlineTaskCreateFailed: Failed to create the inline task.
notifications.inlineTaskHeadingInvalid: Inline task heading must start with 1 to 6 # characters, like {{example}}.
notifications.openMarkdownForCheckboxLine: Open a markdown note and place the cursor on a checkbox line.
notifications.currentLineNotPlainCheckbox: The current line is not a plain checkbox task.
notifications.checkboxUpgradeFailed: Could not upgrade checkbox line into an Operon task.
notifications.singleLineFragmentOrCursor: Select a single line fragment or place the cursor on one line
notifications.fileSubtaskCreateFailed: Failed to create the file subtask.
notifications.terminalDateWorkflowResolveFailed: Unable to resolve workflow status for the selected terminal date.
notifications.terminalDateReopenFailed: Unable to reopen task after terminal date removal.

notifications.pipelineRenameMigrationNoticeFailed: Rename migration updated {{fileTasks}} file tasks and {{inlineTasks}} inline tasks. {{failedFileTasks}} file tasks and {{failedInlineTasks}} inline tasks failed.

notifications.demoWorkspaceCreateFailed: Failed to create the demo workspace.

notifications.inlineInsertFailed: Failed to insert the inline task into the configured target file.
notifications.inlineCreatedTrashFailed: Inline task created, but moving the source file to trash failed. Duplicate operonId may remain.

duplicateOperonId.title: Operon ID Conflict
duplicateOperonId.intro: New duplicate operonId conflicts open this window automatically. You can close it anytime and reopen it from the command palette.

settings.title: Operon Settings
settings.languageDesc: UI language. "Auto" uses your Obsidian locale setting.
settings.keyMappingsDesc: Map Obsidian property names to Operon canonical keys for YAML sync.
settings.syncWriteDebounceDesc: How long to wait before propagating sync changes.
settings.selfEchoWindowDesc: Ignore file events from own writes within this window.
settings.syncLockTimeoutDesc: Maximum time to hold a per-task write lock.
settings.indexDebounceDesc: Debounce interval for incremental reindex events.
settings.fullReindexOnStartupDesc: Always run full vault reindex when plugin loads.
settings.taskBarChipsDesc: Choose which field chips appear on task bars.
settings.subtasksDefaultExpandedDesc: Show subtask lists expanded when task bar loads.
settings.timeFormatDesc: Choose how clock times are displayed across Operon.
settings.demoWorkspaceDesc: Create or repair the Operon Basics Project, command reference note, setup project, and bundled filters without overwriting your edits.
settings.demoWorkspacePromptMessage: Operon can add a small demo workspace with real tasks, a command reference note, a setup project, and ready-made filters, so you can explore the main workflows safely.
settings.estimateAutoReallocationDesc: When an estimate increase can be reallocated from the parent chain, apply it automatically on save or close and show the transfer preview as read-only.
settings.inlineTaskDefaultSavePathDesc: Choose where New Operon Task writes inline tasks by default.
settings.inlineTaskUseDailyNote: Save new inline tasks to today's daily note
settings.inlineTaskUseDailyNoteDesc: When enabled, the New Operon Task flow writes inline tasks to the current daily note.
settings.inlineTaskTargetFileDesc: Markdown file used when the default save path is Specific File. New tasks are grouped under ## [[YYYY-MM-DD]].
settings.inlineTaskHeadingDesc: Daily Notes heading keyword. First heading containing this phrase receives new inline tasks. If none exists, Operon creates a ## heading. Specific File mode uses automatic ## [[YYYY-MM-DD]] headings instead.
settings.inlineParentTaskTargetModeDesc: Choose where New Operon Task writes inline tasks when the selected parent is an inline task.
settings.fileParentTaskTargetModeDesc: Choose where New Operon Task writes inline tasks when the selected parent is a file task.
settings.parentFileHeadingKeywordDesc: First heading containing this phrase receives new inline tasks. If none exists, Operon creates a ## heading at the end of the parent file.
settings.autoParentInlineSubtasksDesc: When creating an inline task inside a file task, automatically set its parent to that file task.
settings.autoParentLinkedFileSubtasksDesc: When creating a linked file task inside a file task, automatically set its parent to that file task.
settings.fileTasksFolderDesc: Default folder for new file tasks. Default is Operon/Tasks; leave empty for vault root.
settings.fileTaskInlineParentTargetModeDesc: Choose where New Operon Task creates file tasks when the selected parent is an inline task.
settings.fileTaskFileParentTargetModeDesc: Choose where New Operon Task creates file tasks when the selected parent is a file task.
settings.showTasksEmojiConvertIcon: Show Tasks-to-Operon icon on classic task lines
settings.showTasksEmojiConvertIconDesc: Live Preview only. Shows a circle-plus icon on hover for Tasks emoji lines that can be converted to Operon.
settings.showPlainCheckboxConvertIcon: Show checkbox-to-Operon icon on classic task lines
settings.showPlainCheckboxConvertIconDesc: Live Preview only. Shows a square-plus icon on hover for plain checkbox lines that can be upgraded to Operon.
settings.fallbackOpenStateIconDesc: Used when a task has no taskIcon and its state is open across Live Preview and compact task rows.
settings.fallbackFinishedStateIconDesc: Used when a task has no taskIcon and its state is finished across Live Preview and compact task rows.
settings.fallbackCancelledStateIconDesc: Used when a task has no taskIcon and its state is cancelled across Live Preview and compact task rows.
settings.taskCreatorToolbarSectionDesc: Choose which toolbar icons are visible in New Operon Task and adjust their order. This changes only the visual toolbar, not task creation functionality.
settings.taskCreatorToolbarNoVisible: No toolbar icons are currently visible.
settings.pinnedDockAutoCloseDesc: Collapse the pinned dock back to the pin icon after the mouse leaves it. Turn this off to keep the dock always open.
settings.pinnedDockAutoCloseDelayDesc: Seconds to wait after the mouse leaves the dock before collapsing it.
settings.pinnedDockTaskCardWidthDesc: Width of pinned task cards in horizontal layout (120-800).
settings.pinnedDockTaskColorSourceDesc: Choose which task color system pinned task cards should follow.
settings.pinnedDockDisableOnMobileDesc: Hide and disable the pinned dock on phones while keeping it available on desktop and tablet.
settings.pinnedDockLayoutDesc: How pinned task cards are arranged in the dock.
settings.pinnedDockGridColumnsDesc: Number of columns when layout is set to Grid.
settings.pinnedDockAutoPinActiveTimerTaskDesc: Pin a task automatically when its timer starts. The pin remains when the timer stops.
settings.pinnedDockAutoUnpinFinishedTasksDesc: Automatically unpin a task when it reaches a finished or cancelled state.
settings.inlineTaskIconsSectionDesc: Choose which compact inline task chips are visible in Live Preview conceal mode and reading view, then adjust their order. This affects only the compact chip row.
settings.filterTaskIconsSectionDesc: Choose which compact task chips are visible in filter views and embedded filter results, then adjust their order. This affects only filter surfaces.
settings.filterShowSubtasksDesc: Expand parent tasks to show their subtasks across all filter views.
settings.filterShowOnlyOpenSubtasks: Show only open subtasks under parent task
settings.filterShowOnlyOpenSubtasksDesc: When enabled, only open subtasks stay visible under each parent task across all filter views.
settings.taskFinderShowRecentModifiedOnOpen: Show recently modified tasks when Task Finder opens.
settings.taskFinderShowRecentModifiedOnOpenDesc: When enabled, Task Finder opens with the 'Recently Modified' button selected.
settings.taskFinderRecentModifiedDaysDesc: How many days the 'Recently Modified' button considers when listing updated tasks.
settings.taskFinderVisibleResultCountDesc: How many Task Finder result rows stay visible before the list scrolls.
settings.taskFinderRememberLastScopesDesc: Reopen Task Finder with the last selected scope buttons and project selection. Turn off to start with Inline Tasks and File Tasks only.
settings.taskFinderShortcutsDesc: Configure hotkeys that switch Task Finder scopes. Type the shortcut in search, such as .1, to toggle the matching scope button.
settings.taskFinderShortcutInputDesc: Stored without the dot. Current hotkey: {{command}}
settings.taskFinderShortcutInvalid: Task Finder shortcuts must be 1-3 lowercase letters or numbers, without dots, colons, or spaces.
settings.taskFinderIconsSectionDesc: Choose which compact chips appear in Task Finder results, then adjust their order. Chips are visual only and do not use the chip display-mode toggle.
settings.overlayTaskIconsSectionDesc: Choose which compact chips are visible in file task overlay mode, then adjust their order. Chips appear after the progress bar and before the edit action.
settings.inlineRepeatPlacementDesc: Choose whether the next inline occurrence is inserted above or below the completed task.
settings.fileRepeatDestinationDesc: Choose where new recurring file task occurrences are created.
settings.fileRepeatCustomFolderDesc: Folder used when 'Custom folder' is selected as the file occurrence destination.
settings.repeatYamlPropertyRemovalTitle: Property Cleanup for Recurring File Tasks
settings.repeatYamlPropertyRemovalDesc: Applies only to recurring file tasks. Enter raw YAML property names exactly as they appear in the file, separated by commas. Matching values will be cleared in newly created files.
settings.repeatYamlPropertyRemovalPropertiesDesc: Separate raw YAML property names with commas.
settings.repeatYamlPropertyRemovalDeleteMessage: This only removes the cleanup rule. Existing recurring task files are not changed.
settings.repeatYamlPropertyRemovalNoSeries: No eligible recurring file task series available.
settings.repeatYamlPropertyRemovalMissingSeries: This repeat series no longer exists. Remove the rule when you no longer need it.
settings.keyMappingsIntro: Each task field has a canonical key used by Operon internally and a visible property name shown in YAML and the UI. Renaming the visible property name does not change the canonical key.
settings.keyMappingsLegendHideDesc: Hide in rendered file-task metadata view only
settings.keyMappingsNoCustom: No custom keys defined. Use the button below to add one.
settings.keyMappingsHideTooltip: Keeps the property in YAML and hides it only from the rendered file-task metadata view.
settings.keyMappingsHideAria: Hide in rendered file-task metadata view
settings.keyMappingsIconPlaceholder: Search Lucide icon or leave blank
settings.keyMappingsIconPickerTooltip: Choose an icon for this canonical key. Leave blank to keep it unset.
settings.keyMappingsCustomCanonicalFormat: Key must be alphanumeric, starting with a letter.
settings.keyMappingsCustomDescriptionFallback: Custom property available in file-task YAML and Operon views.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_operonId: Internal unique task ID used to keep the file task linked to Operon systems.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_status: Workflow state used by pipelines, filters, and task actions.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_priority: Priority value used for sorting, views, and planning decisions.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_dateDue: Due date used to show deadlines and due markers.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_dateScheduled: Planned date used for scheduling and calendar placement.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_dateStarted: Earliest date the task should begin.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_datetimeCreated: Creation timestamp stored for the current task instance.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_dateCompleted: Completion date set when the task is marked done.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_dateCancelled: Cancellation date set when the task is marked cancelled.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_datetimeStart: Scheduled start datetime used by calendar and timing views.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_datetimeEnd: Scheduled end datetime used by calendar and timing views.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_estimate: Estimated work duration stored in seconds.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_duration: Tracked work duration stored in seconds.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_totalEstimate: Automatic estimate total including child tasks.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_totalDuration: Automatic tracked duration total including child tasks.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_repeat: Recurring rule that controls future task generation.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_repeatSeriesId: Internal recurring series ID used to group generated occurrences.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_datetimeRepeatEnd: End datetime that limits recurrence generation.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_parentTask: Parent task ID used to build task hierarchies.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_blocking: Tasks that depend on this task before they can continue.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_blockedBy: Tasks that must finish before this task can continue.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_assignees: People responsible for doing the task.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_contexts: Contexts or environments relevant to the task.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_progress: Completion percentage used in views and summaries.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_reminders: Reminder timestamps or offsets associated with the task.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_timezone: Timezone used to interpret scheduled datetime values.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_trackers: Completed tracking sessions stored as datetime ranges.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_activeTracker: Active timer start datetime while tracking is running.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_taskIcon: Icon name used in Operon task views.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_taskColor: Color value used in Operon task views.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_note: Short note or annotation shown alongside the task.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_links: External web links associated with the task.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_datetimeModified: Automatic last-modified timestamp for the task.
settings.calendarHoverMenuActionsDesc: These actions appear on task-icon hover menus only when the current task data supports them. The visible menu can change by context.
settings.calendarHoverMenuOpenDelayDesc: Delay in milliseconds before a contextual hover menu opens.
settings.contextualMenuActionsDesc: These actions appear on contextual menus only when the current task data supports them. The visible menu can change by context.
settings.contextualMenuOpenDelayDesc: Delay in milliseconds before a contextual menu opens.
settings.contextualMenuMatrixDesc: Choose which contextual menu surfaces can show each globally enabled action. Existing task and surface rules still decide whether an action is available.
settings.contextualMenuMatrixLockedGlobal: First enable this action above to choose its surfaces.
settings.contextualMenuMatrixLockedSurface: This action is not supported on this surface.
settings.calendarHoverActionOpenEditorDesc: Show this action in the calendar hover menu when the current block can open the task editor.
settings.contextualMenuActionOpenEditorDesc: Show this action in the contextual menu when the current item can open the task editor.
settings.calendarHoverActionTaskStatusDesc: Show this action in the calendar hover menu when the current block can update the task status.
settings.contextualMenuActionTaskStatusDesc: Show this action in the contextual menu when the current item can update the task status.
settings.calendarHoverActionPinToggleDesc: Show this action in the calendar hover menu when the current task can be pinned or unpinned.
settings.contextualMenuActionPinToggleDesc: Show this action in the contextual menu when the current task can be pinned or unpinned.
settings.calendarHoverActionStartTimerDesc: Show this action in the calendar hover menu when the current block can start or resume tracking.
settings.contextualMenuActionStartTimerDesc: Show this action in the contextual menu when the current item can start or resume tracking.
settings.calendarHoverActionMarkDoneDesc: Show this action in the calendar hover menu when the current block can be marked as finished.
settings.contextualMenuActionMarkDoneDesc: Show this action in the contextual menu when the current item can be marked as finished.
settings.contextualMenuActionCancelTaskDesc: Show this action in the contextual menu when the current task can be cancelled.
settings.calendarHoverActionUnscheduleDesc: Show this action in the calendar hover menu when the current block can clear its schedule.
settings.contextualMenuActionUnscheduleDesc: Show this action in the contextual menu when the current item can clear its schedule.
settings.calendarHoverActionJumpToSourceDesc: Show this action in the calendar hover menu when the current block can jump to its source note.
settings.contextualMenuActionJumpToSourceDesc: Show this action in the contextual menu when the current item can jump to its source note.
settings.calendarHoverActionSetAsTrackedDesc: Show this action in the calendar hover menu when a past timed block can be logged as tracked time.
settings.contextualMenuActionSetAsTrackedDesc: Show this action in the contextual menu when a past timed block can be logged as tracked time.
settings.calendarHoverActionClearDueDateDesc: Show this action in the calendar hover menu when the current task has a due date to clear.
settings.contextualMenuActionClearDueDateDesc: Show this action in the contextual menu when the current task has a due date to clear.
settings.calendarHoverActionSkipThisOccurrenceDes: Show this action in the calendar hover menu for projected recurring occurrences.
settings.contextualMenuActionSkipThisOccurrenceDe: Show this action in the contextual menu for projected recurring occurrences.
settings.externalCalendarsDesc: Add read-only ICS calendars that render inside the Operon calendar as timed or all-day events.
settings.externalCalendarsAddDesc: Create another read-only ICS calendar source with its own color and refresh interval.
settings.externalCalendarEnabledDesc: Turn this external calendar source on or off without removing its cached events.
settings.externalCalendarNameDesc: Shown in settings and stored with the source metadata.
settings.externalCalendarUrlDesc: Accepts https, webcal, or direct .ics links.
settings.externalCalendarHideCreatedEventsDesc: When enabled, this source hides external events that already have a matching task on the same scheduled date. When disabled, external events stay visible.
settings.externalCalendarColorDesc: Used as the event background color inside the Operon calendar.
settings.externalCalendarRefreshHoursDesc: Background sync cadence for this source. Rendering always uses cache immediately.
settings.deleteExternalCalendarMessage: This removes the external calendar source from settings and clears its visibility from calendar presets. Cached events for this source are removed after settings are saved.
settings.calendarSidebarCalendarsDefaultStateDesc: Choose whether the sidebar Calendars section starts expanded or collapsed when a calendar leaf opens.
settings.calendarSidebarTaskPoolDefaultStateDesc: Choose whether the sidebar Task Pool starts expanded or collapsed when a calendar leaf opens.
settings.calendarSidebarFinishedTasksDefaultState: Choose whether the sidebar Finished Tasks section starts expanded or collapsed when a calendar leaf opens.
settings.calendarSidebarTaskPoolLimitDesc: The sidebar task pool initially shows the {{initialLimit}} most recently updated tasks. Search scans the full list and shows up to {{searchLimit}} matches.
settings.trackerHistoryWindowDaysDesc: Number of recent calendar days shown in the tracker sidebar history.
settings.trackerTaskDescriptionClickActionDesc: Choose what happens when you click a task description inside the Time Session History sidebar.
settings.trackerSplitSessionsAtMidnightDesc: When a tracker session crosses into a new day, store it as separate per-day tracker ranges for cleaner history and reporting.
settings.trackerShowStatusBarTimer: Show active timer in status bar
settings.trackerShowStatusBarTimerDesc: Show the tracker control in Obsidian's status bar. Displays a play button when idle and the active timer while tracking.
settings.flowTimePauseDurationDesc: Length of breaks taken in FlowTime.
settings.flowTimeUseLastSelectedDuration: Use last selected duration as FlowTime default
settings.flowTimeUseLastSelectedDurationDesc: Use the duration set from the FlowTime dial as the next default session length.
settings.flowTimeDefaultSessionMinutesDesc: Countdown length used when entering FlowTime (when 'use last selected duration' is off).
settings.flowTimeShowNumericTimerDesc: Show the numeric elapsed or remaining time in the TrackTime & FlowTime sidebar.
settings.flowTimeNotifyOnTargetReachedDesc: Show a small notice when the FlowTime countdown reaches zero.
settings.kanbanSettingsDesc: Configure swimlane-first kanban presets, default board selection, and shared column sizing.
settings.kanbanDefaultPresetDesc: New kanban leaves start with this preset unless the leaf already has its own saved state.
settings.kanbanExpandedColumnWidthDesc: Controls the width of expanded kanban columns across all presets.
settings.kanbanSwimlaneMaxHeightDesc: Maximum tasks visible per kanban cell before it becomes scrollable.
settings.kanbanAddPresetDesc: Create another reusable kanban board preset.
settings.kanbanAtLeastOnePresetRequired: At least one kanban preset is required.
settings.activeKanbanPresetMissing: The active kanban preset could not be found.
settings.kanbanPresetNameDesc: Shown in the kanban toolbar preset switcher.
settings.kanbanQuickPresetNameDesc: Shown in the kanban view toolbar.
settings.kanbanPipelineDesc: Columns are generated from the selected pipeline statuses.
settings.kanbanSwimlaneFieldDesc: Rows are generated from values of this field.
settings.kanbanTaskColorSourceDesc: Choose which task color system kanban cards should follow.
settings.kanbanCollapseEmptyColumnsDesc: Automatically collapse pipeline columns that currently have no matching tasks.
settings.kanbanCollapseEmptySwimlanesDesc: Automatically collapse swimlanes that currently have no matching tasks.
settings.kanbanAutoCollapseFinishedColumnsDesc: Automatically collapse pipeline columns marked as finished in this kanban preset. Improves performance on large boards.
settings.kanbanSortingDesc: Control how tasks are ordered inside kanban cells.
settings.kanbanManualOrderingDesc: Cards keep the order you set by dragging them inside each kanban cell.
settings.deleteKanbanPresetMessage: This removes the kanban preset from settings. If it is the current default, the first remaining preset becomes the new default.
settings.pipelinesDesc: Define task workflows. Each pipeline contains an ordered list of statuses. Status values use the format Pipeline.Status (e.g. Project.In_Progress).
settings.priorityDesc: Define priority levels and their colors. Order determines rank — the top item has the highest priority. Use these labels in the priority field of your tasks.
settings.deletePriorityMessage: This removes the priority definition and color. Existing task priority values are not migrated or cleared automatically.
settings.defaultPriorityDesc: Automatically assigned when creating a new task. Leave empty for no default.
settings.deletePipelineMessage: This removes the pipeline definition and its matrix settings. Existing task status values are not migrated automatically.
settings.statusAlreadyExists: Status "{{name}}" already exists in this pipeline.
settings.scheduledTargetTerminalTooltip: Terminal statuses cannot be scheduled targets.
settings.scheduledTargetTooltip: Move tasks into this status when a scheduled date is assigned.
settings.trackingTargetTerminalTooltip: Terminal statuses cannot be tracking targets.
settings.trackingTargetTooltip: Move tasks into this status when tracking starts.
settings.finishedStatusAutomationTooltip: Scheduled or tracking targets cannot be finished statuses.
settings.finishedStatusTooltip: Mark this status as the pipeline finished state.
settings.cancelledStatusAutomationTooltip: Scheduled or tracking targets cannot be cancelled statuses.
settings.cancelledStatusTooltip: Mark this status as the pipeline cancelled state.
settings.deleteStatusMessage: This removes the status definition from the {{pipeline}} pipeline. Existing task status values are not migrated or cleared automatically.
settings.pipelineAtLeastOneStatus: A pipeline must have at least one status.
settings.pipelineRenameMigrationUnexpectedError: Rename migration encountered an unexpected error. Review affected task statuses.
settings.pipelineRenameMigrationMessage: This change will update {{fileTaskCount}} file tasks and {{inlineTaskCount}} inline tasks across {{touchedFileCount}} files. Continue?
settings.priorityRenameMigrationUnexpectedError: Priority rename migration encountered an unexpected error. Review affected task priorities.
settings.priorityRenameMigrationMessage: This change will update {{fileTaskCount}} file tasks and {{inlineTaskCount}} inline tasks across {{touchedFileCount}} files. Continue?
settings.fileTaskTemplateFolderDesc: Top-level markdown files in this folder are listed in the template picker. The built-in Minimal File Template for Operon Tasks is always available. Leave empty to show only the built-in template.
settings.fileTaskTemplatePreviewNoFolder: No template folder selected. The picker will show only the built-in Minimal File Template for Operon Tasks.
settings.fileTaskTemplatePreviewFolderMissing: Template folder not found. The picker will fall back to the built-in Minimal File Template for Operon Tasks.
settings.fileTaskTemplatePreviewNoTemplates: No top-level markdown files found in the selected folder. The picker will still show the built-in Minimal File Template for Operon Tasks.
settings.fileTaskTemplatePreviewTemplates: Top-level templates: {{names}}. Default conversion template uses the first file alphabetically.
settings.fileTaskTemplatePreviewDefaultConversion: Default conversion template uses the first file alphabetically.
settings.excludedFoldersDesc: Tasks in these folders stay outside Operon's global index, views, and placeholder normalization. The template folder is excluded separately.
settings.excludedFileTasksFolderBlocked: {{folder}} is the File tasks folder or contains it, so it cannot be excluded.
settings.excludedFileTasksFolderRemoved: Removed the File tasks folder from excluded folders.
settings.createDailyNotesAsOperonTask: Create daily notes as an Operon task
settings.createDailyNotesAsOperonTaskDesc: When enabled, daily notes created by Operon are initialized with the Minimal File Template for Operon Tasks.

tooltips.convertTasksSyntaxToOperonTask: Convert Tasks syntax to Operon task
tooltips.searchTasksInKanbanBoard: Search tasks in this kanban board

errors.timerAlreadyRunning: Timer already running on another task

calendar.title: Operon Calendar
calendar.previousSpanTooltip: Move backward by the current visible day span.
calendar.nextSpanTooltip: Move forward by the current visible day span.
calendar.noSearchMatches: No tasks match the current search.
calendar.noOpenTasksForList: No open tasks are available for this list.
calendar.noFinishedTasksForDay: No finished tasks for this day.
calendar.noCalendarFilterMatches: No tasks match the current calendar filter.
calendar.noFilteredTasksVisible: No filtered tasks are visible in the current calendar range.
calendar.calendarViewSettingsHelp: Only filter matching is applied here. Filter grouping and sorting do not affect calendar layout.
calendar.filterPickerNoFilterDesc: Show all tasks in this calendar view.
calendar.activeCalendarPresetMissing: The active calendar preset could not be found.
calendar.calendarPresetQuickHelp: Quick access to the active calendar preset settings.
calendar.presetNameDesc: Shown in the calendar view preset switcher.
calendar.calendarPresetTypeDesc: Choose whether this preset uses the classic time grid or the multi-week block layout.
calendar.weekCountDesc: Choose how many consecutive weeks this preset displays.
calendar.focusedWeekNumberDesc: When you choose a day, place it at this week's position in the multi-week view.
calendar.visibleDayCountDesc: How many consecutive days this preset displays.
calendar.todayPositionDesc: Choose which visible column should hold the anchor day when opening or recentering this preset.
calendar.slotMinutesDesc: Base slot size for the timed grid in this preset.
calendar.hiddenTimeDesc: Choose one 15-minute interval to collapse in the timed grid for this preset.
calendar.taskColorSourceDesc: Choose whether calendar blocks use task color, accent color, workflow status color, priority color, or no color.
calendar.appearanceLightDesc: Color scheme used when Obsidian is in light mode.
calendar.appearanceDarkDesc: Color scheme used when Obsidian is in dark mode.
calendar.showWeekendsDesc: Keep Saturdays and Sundays visible when counting calendar days.
calendar.rescheduleReplaceMessage: This task already has calendar fields. Replace the existing plan with the new slot?
calendar.rescheduleOverwriteMessage: This task already has scheduling data. Replacing it will overwrite the current calendar plan.
calendar.materializationUnsupportedConditions: Filter conditions that cannot be applied automatically
calendar.materializationPureAllOnly: Only conditions inside pure "all" groups can be applied automatically.
calendar.materializationUnsafeField: This filter field is not safe to write automatically from the calendar.
calendar.materializationMissingValue: The filter condition has no explicit value to apply.
calendar.materializationConflictingExactReason: Conflicting exact filter requirements for the same field cannot be applied automatically.
calendar.materializationExactOrAdditiveOnly: Only exact-set text or number conditions and additive list or tag requirements can be applied automatically.
calendar.materializationUnsupportedLogic: Conditions inside "{{logic}}" groups cannot be applied automatically.
calendar.materializationAllAreReason: Automatic calendar updates can add missing values, but they do not remove existing list items required by the 'all of' rule.
calendar.calendarSettingsDesc: Configure reusable presets, default navigation behavior, and sidebar behavior for the Operon calendar view.
calendar.defaultPresetDesc: New calendar leaves start with this preset unless the leaf already has its own saved state.
calendar.weekStartDesc: Controls week labels and future calendar navigation defaults.
calendar.showWeekLabelOnFirstDay: Show week label on first day
calendar.showWeekLabelOnFirstDayDesc: Show a large Wxx label inside the first day of each week in calendar headers.
calendar.inlineTaskHeadingDesc: Markdown heading used as the insertion target for calendar inline tasks. If empty, the default placeholder heading is used.
calendar.initialScrollModeDesc: Choose whether new calendar leaves open at a fixed hour or automatically around the current local time.
calendar.currentTimePositionDesc: Used by auto scroll mode. Controls how much of the visible range stays above versus below the current time.
calendar.defaultScrollHourDesc: Used only when the initial scroll mode is set to Fixed hour.
calendar.timeGridScaleDesc: Scales the vertical hour spacing in timed calendar views.
calendar.viewPresetsDesc: Each preset controls the visible day span, timed grid density, and overall calendar layout.
calendar.addPresetDesc: Create another reusable calendar layout such as 3-day focus or 14-day planning.
calendar.showAllDayLaneDesc: Display scheduled all-day blocks above the timed grid in all calendar presets.
calendar.showDueLaneDesc: Display due-date markers in a dedicated lane above the timed grid in all calendar presets.
calendar.sidebarWidthDesc: Controls the width of the calendar sidebar in pixels. You can also drag the sidebar edge directly in sidebar mode.
calendar.showWeekNumbersDesc: Show a week-number column in the sidebar mini month.
calendar.atLeastOneCalendarPresetRequired: At least one calendar preset is required.
calendar.deleteCalendarPresetMessage: This removes the calendar preset from settings. If it is the current default, the first remaining preset becomes the new default.

taskEditor.removeInlineTaskMessage: This removes the inline task. The line will remain empty. Continue?
taskEditor.removeFileTaskMessage: This moves the file task to Obsidian trash. Continue?
taskEditor.datetimeEndRequiresStart: Set a start time before choosing an end time.
taskEditor.datetimeOffGridTimeNotice: Existing time will be preserved until you change it.
taskEditor.estimateReallocationTooltip: Subtract this estimate delta from the parent chain to keep the same total estimate.
taskEditor.estimateReallocationPartialTooltip: Part of this estimate delta can be subtracted from the parent chain.
taskEditor.estimateReallocationNeedsIncrease: Increase the estimate above its saved value to subtract the delta from the parent.
taskEditor.estimateReallocationNoBudget: No available estimate budget was found in the parent chain.
taskEditor.estimateReallocationNoParent: This task has no direct parent.
taskEditor.estimateReallocationConfirmMessage: This will subtract the full estimate delta from the parent chain while keeping the child's new estimate.
taskEditor.estimateReallocationPartialConfirmMessag: Only part of the estimate delta can be subtracted from the parent chain. The remaining uncovered delta will increase the total estimate.
taskEditor.estimateReallocationAutoAppliedMessage: This estimate delta was automatically reallocated from the parent chain.
taskEditor.estimateReallocationAutoPartialMessage: Part of this estimate delta was automatically reallocated. The uncovered part increased the total estimate.
taskEditor.estimateReallocationAutoHint: Automatic reallocation will run when this estimate is committed.
taskEditor.estimateReallocationUnavailable: Parent estimate changed while this dialog was open. Try again.
taskEditor.webLinkRequired: Use an http or https link.
taskEditor.terminalDateConflict: Only one terminal date can be set at a time.
taskEditor.terminalDateWorkflowResolveFailed: Unable to resolve workflow status for the selected terminal date.
taskEditor.repeatAddHint: Use the picker to define schedule-based or completion-based recurrence.
taskEditor.repeatUnsupportedWarning: This repeat value is not supported by the picker yet.
taskEditor.repeatSkipUnavailable: Skipping future occurrences works only for saved schedule- or count-based repeats with a fixed scheduled date.
taskEditor.repeatSkipNoProjectedDates: No projected occurrences in this month.
taskEditor.repeatSkipModeDoneHint: Future skip is unavailable for completion-based recurrence.
taskEditor.repeatScopeThisTaskDesc: Apply the temporal change only to this occurrence.
taskEditor.repeatScopeThisAndFollowingDesc: Apply the temporal change from this occurrence forward.
taskEditor.repeatScopeSkipThisTaskDesc: Skip this occurrence without editing older occurrences.
taskEditor.parentTaskClearFirst: Clear the current parent task before choosing another one.
taskEditor.parentTaskPlaceholder: Search by operonId or task text
taskEditor.subtasksPlaceholder: Search by operonId or task text
taskEditor.subtasksSaveFirst: Save task first to add subtasks
taskEditor.invalidSessionRange: End time must be later than start time.
taskEditor.chooseRepeatingFileTaskSeries: Choose a recurring file task series...
taskEditor.noMatchingRepeatingFileTaskSeries: No matching recurring file task series
taskEditor.renameMigrationIntro: Updating task statuses. This window stays locked until the migration finishes.
taskEditor.renameMigrationStopped: The rename migration stopped early. Review the status below, then close this window.
taskEditor.renameMigrationFinishedIntro: Rename migration finished. Review the counts below, then press OK or click outside to close.
taskEditor.priorityRenameMigrationIntro: Updating task priorities. This window stays locked until the migration finishes.
taskEditor.priorityRenameMigrationStopped: The priority rename migration stopped early. Review the status below, then close this window.
taskEditor.priorityRenameMigrationFinishedIntro: Priority rename migration finished. Review the counts below, then press OK or click outside to close.

filterSets.tabDesc: Define named filter sets to query tasks in the Filter View. Each set can have multiple conditions, match logic, and optional sorting.
filterSets.taskCardSettingsDesc: These options affect task cards in Filter View, embedded filters, and filter previews.
filterSets.empty: No filter sets defined. Use the button below to add one.
filterSets.noFilterSets: No filters defined. Go to Settings → Filters to create one.
filterSets.usedByNone: Not used by calendar or kanban presets.
filterSets.deleteFilterMessage: Delete filter "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
